description: Query local cortex SQLite logs through a bundled stdio MCP server.
long_description: cortex packages the existing cortex stdio entrypoint as a local MCP Bundle. It is query-only: it reads the configured SQLite database and does not start syslog listeners, HTTP servers, Docker Compose, REST, or deploy flows.
name: cortex

tools.description: Search, tail, summarize, and inspect logs from the configured local cortex SQLite database.
tools.name: cortex

data_dir.description: Directory containing cortex.db plus WAL/SHM sidecars. The bundled stdio server reads this database as CORTEX_DB_PATH=<data_dir>/cortex.db.
data_dir.title: Data directory
